    --hash=sha256:9ed0579d3502c94b4b3732ac120375cda96f923114522847de4b3bb98b96b6b7 \

    #   jupyter-core
    #   nbformat
tzdata==2026.1 ; sys_platform == 'emscripten' or sys_platform == 'win32' \
    --hash=sha256:4b1d2be7ac37ceafd7327b961aa3a54e467efbdb563a23655fbfe0d39cfc42a9 \
